'''鈭歝h-j-r-s''' ('''kachajresoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monolith|monolith]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monolith|monolith]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-j-r-s
|-
! Lemma
| kachajresoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichajresoko|thichajresoko]] || [[word:jichajresoko|jichajresoko]] || [[word:shichajresoko|shichajresoko]] || [[word:kichajresoko|kichajresoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchajresoko|thuthuchajresoko]] || [[word:jujuchajresoko|jujuchajresoko]] || [[word:shushuchajresoko|shushuchajresoko]] || [[word:kukuchajresoko|kukuchajresoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchajresoko|thuchajresoko]] || [[word:juchajresoko|juchajresoko]] || [[word:shuchajresoko|shuchajresoko]] || [[word:kuchajresoko|kuchajresoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchajresoko|thuchajresoko]] || [[word:juchajresoko|juchajresoko]] || [[word:shuchajresoko|shuchajresoko]] || [[word:kuchajresoko|kuchajresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechajresoko|thechajresoko]] || [[word:jechajresoko|jechajresoko]] || [[word:shechajresoko|shechajresoko]] || [[word:kechajresoko|kechajresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochajresoko|thothochajresoko]] || [[word:jojochajresoko|jojochajresoko]] || [[word:shoshochajresoko|shoshochajresoko]] || [[word:kokochajresoko|kokochajresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochajresoko|thochajresoko]] || [[word:jochajresoko|jochajresoko]] || [[word:shochajresoko|shochajresoko]] || [[word:kochajresoko|kochajresoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochajresoko|thochajresoko]] || [[word:jochajresoko|jochajresoko]] || [[word:shochajresoko|shochajresoko]] || [[word:kochajresoko|kochajresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chajresoko|th忙chajresoko]] || [[word:j忙chajresoko|j忙chajresoko]] || [[word:sh忙chajresoko|sh忙chajresoko]] || [[word:k忙chajresoko|k忙chajresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachajresoko|thathachajresoko]] || [[word:jajachajresoko|jajachajresoko]] || [[word:shashachajresoko|shashachajresoko]] || [[word:kakachajresoko|kakachajresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachajresoko|thachajresoko]] || [[word:jachajresoko|jachajresoko]] || [[word:shachajresoko|shachajresoko]] || [[word:kachajresoko|kachajresoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachajresoko|thachajresoko]] || [[word:jachajresoko|jachajresoko]] || [[word:shachajresoko|shachajresoko]] || [[word:kachajresoko|kachajresoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachajresithi|shachajresithi]] || [[word:shachajresiji|shachajresiji]] || [[word:shachajresishi|shachajresishi]] || [[word:shachajresiki|shachajresiki]]
